principle: No feature ships until it survives the live user loop.

checks.name: health
checks.detail: Live app responds with a version.

checks.name: command_center_resolvers
checks.detail: Command Center callouts expose resolver buttons.

checks.name: actions_source_context
checks.detail: Actions endpoint supports domain filtering and source context.

checks.name: pull_sales
checks.detail: Pull Engine returns an actionable sales card.

evidence.top_title: Compare acquisition cost, sell-through, and gross margin for the top five phone models, then add the best two to today's sourcing list.
evidence.top_metric: Sell-through rate, acquisition cost, gross margin, days-to-sale, inventory turns, and result logged.

checks.name: live_ingest
checks.detail: Manual sales source produced a live signal, linked memory, accepted Watch/Act status updates, and cleaned up.

evidence.recommended_action: Review this live signal and choose Act, Watch, Update Rule, or Ignore.

checks.name: pattern_to_action
checks.detail: Pattern was recontextualized into an action queue item with source context.

checks.name: decision_layer
checks.detail: Signal created a decision review and feedback updated the rule loop.

checks.name: stock_intel
checks.detail: Stock Intel returns financials and extracted signals.

checks.name: asset_lab
checks.detail: Temporary asset was opened, broken down, saved to library, labeled, and fully deleted.

checks.name: memory_loop
checks.detail: Temporary entry was saved, pulled, result-logged, and cleaned up.
